name_en: 💕Includes full original green box packaging💕GG👉The Gucci Cosmogonie series debuted at the historic Castello di Monte in Italy. On the runway, aesthetic elements from different eras and locations complement each other, connecting the past with the present. This new crescent-shaped shoulder bag is a runway piece, drawing inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, crafted in soft leather and featuring the double-G logo that debuted in the 1970s. Light brown soft leather, shiny gold-tone hardware. Inside: 1 zip pocket. This bag comes with an extra shoulder strap that can be fastened to the bag with a buckle. Adjustable shoulder strap with double-G magnetic snap closure.
